case_title: HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. BRYAN DANIELS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,453.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, BRYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR 27, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DUE TO THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY THE COURT. JUDGE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
